Interface IuSamlServiceProvider

public interface IuSamlServiceProvider
SAML 2.0 Service Provider interface.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IuSamlPrincipal
    getPrincipalIdentity(edu.iu.IuRequestAttributes requestAttributes)
    Gets the authenticated SAML principal.
    edu.iu.IuStatefulRedirect
    initRequest(URI postUri, URI returnUri)
    Initiate an authentication request.
    String
    metadata()
    Gets configured SP metadata as raw XML.
    edu.iu.IuStatefulRedirect
    verifyResponse(edu.iu.IuRequestAttributes requestAttributes, String samlResponse, String relayState)
    Handles a SAML assertion consumer service POST request.

  • Method Details

    • metadata

      String metadata()
      Gets configured SP metadata as raw XML.
      Returns:
      SP metadata XML

    • initRequest

      edu.iu.IuStatefulRedirect initRequest(URI postUri, URI returnUri)
      Initiate an authentication request.
      Parameters:
      postUri - HTTP POST URI for handling the SAML response
      returnUri - URI to return the user to after successful authentication
      Returns:
      IuStatefulRedirect

    • verifyResponse

      edu.iu.IuStatefulRedirect verifyResponse(edu.iu.IuRequestAttributes requestAttributes, String samlResponse, String relayState)
      Handles a SAML assertion consumer service POST request.
      Parameters:
      requestAttributes - Incoming request attributes
      samlResponse - SAML response received from identity provider after user has been authenticated.
      relayState - state value that received back from identity provider after successful authentication.
      Returns:
      IuStatefulRedirect

    • getPrincipalIdentity

      IuSamlPrincipal getPrincipalIdentity(edu.iu.IuRequestAttributes requestAttributes)
      Gets the authenticated SAML principal.
      Parameters:
      requestAttributes - Incoming request attributes
      Returns:
      IuSamlPrincipal
